opportunities.name: Invest NI Innovation Funding Advisory Service
official_fit_points: Supports Northern Ireland businesses accessing Innovate UK, Horizon Europe, EIC Accelerator, and Eureka routes.
Helps assess project stage, identify calls, find partners, guide applications, critique drafts, and connect specialist advisors.
Available to NI businesses seeking technical innovation and R&D projects for new-to-market products/services, normally above GBP 50000 grant need with match funding.
opportunities.draft_subject: R&D funding advisory request: Aureon evidence automation and AI operations platform
opportunities.next_action: Gary confirms contact details and compliance plan; then submit enquiry or send advisor email with reviewed concept note.

opportunities.name: Invest NI Grant for R&D
official_fit_points: Supports development of an idea into a product, process, or service ready for commercialisation.
Requires clear costs, financial and technical challenges, and commercial benefit.
Only available to Invest NI clients; application accepted only after discussion with Invest NI and issue of a reference number.
opportunities.draft_project_title: Aureon Evidence Automation for SME Compliance and Operational Proof
opportunities.next_action: Use IFAS/advisor route first; build budget and eligible cost schedule.

opportunities.name: InterTradeIreland Innovation Boost
official_fit_points: Offers expert support and funding up to GBP 56000 or EUR 67900.
Supports product development, digitisation, process improvement, and third-level institution expertise.
Initial route is an assessment/enquiry before full application.
opportunities.next_action: Confirm project manager/academic expertise need and submit initial assessment after final payload confirmation.

opportunities.name: Next Wave: Breakthrough Wave 1
official_fit_points: Open to UK registered SMEs applying alone or leading collaboration.
Share of up to GBP 10000000 for industrial research aligned to Createch innovation.
opportunities.next_action: Read the IFS questions, confirm Createch fit, and select creative-technology demonstrator examples.

opportunities.name: EIC Accelerator
official_fit_points: For startups and SMEs with game-changing innovation, TRL 6 to 8.
UK applicants can only apply for grant-only scheme.
Step 1 short proposal requires 12-page form, up to ten-slide pitch deck, and up to three-minute video pitch.
opportunities.next_action: Do not submit first. Build TRL evidence, market map, competitor map, letters of intent, financials, and independent validation.
